query:
INSERT INTO attraction_guides (name, slug, overview, difficulty, published, featured, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT name, slug, overview, 'beginner', published, featured, createdAt, updatedAt 
FROM island_guides 
WHERE (LOWER(name) LIKE '%dive%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%surf%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%snorkel%' OR 
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%reef%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%site%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%spot%' OR
  LOWER(overview) LIKE '%dive site%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%surf spot%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%snorkeling%')
AND slug NOT IN (SELECT slug FROM attraction_guides);
